chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 6616 of 2021 CP D 6617 of 2021 CP D 6618 of 2021 CP D 6619 of 2021 ____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ____________________________________________________________ 1. For hearing of Misc. No. 28356/2021 2. For hearing of main case 30.01.2025 Mr. Mamoon N. Chaudhry, advocate for the petitioner Mr. Ameer Bux Metlo, advocate for respondent Ms. Alizeh Bashir, Assistant Attorney General Per learned counsel these petitions have impugned show cause notices, however, it is stated that it may be just and proper for the said notices to be adjudicated vide a speaking order, after providing opportunity of hearing to the respective petitioners, and subject to the aforesaid no coercive action be taken against the petitioners. Learned counsel for respondent articulates no cavil in such regard and states that these petitions be disposed of. Order accordingly. Office is instructed to place copy of this order in connected matters. Judge Judge Amjad
